Active Planned Care / GoalsStart DateReason
Heart failure self management plan14-May-2023Chronic congestive heart failure (disorder)
  • Patient will monitor and record weight daily to detect early signs of fluid retention.
  • Patient will limit daily sodium intake as recommended to reduce fluid overload.
  • Patient will restrict daily fluid intake as advised to prevent worsening heart failure.
  • Patient will monitor and record blood pressure regularly to manage heart failure and hypertension.
  • Patient will take prescribed heart failure medications as directed without missed doses.
  • Patient will recognize and promptly report symptoms such as increased shortness of breath, swelling, or rapid weight gain.
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension15-Feb-2012Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Increase patient understanding of hypertension and promote lifestyle modifications to support blood pressure control
